title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: OSU EXTENSION SERVICE SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers 4-H Summer Camps with hands-on activities in science, technology, and outdoor skills. Activities focus on learning by doing. 118 Ballard Hall Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Ages 8-15 Hours: Varies by camp (541) 737-2713 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 737-2713 Main phone INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information and camp schedules FEES: Varies by camp DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HOME FOOD SAFETY AND PRESERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - 4-H YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OSU EXTENSION SERVICE
